mechanics.text:
CHARACTER CREATION
YAKUZA MECHWARRIOR
Born into poverty in Japanese neighborhood of the predominately Azami city on the planet Arkab_ you were forced to associate with local Azami t0 survive This further erod ed your already shaky Japanese and left you with social stigma in the eyes of other Combine citizens_ With little hope of rising above your station you turned t0 life of crime where your quick thinking_ street smarts and luck brought you to the attention of the local gumi at young age. Your rise in station made you forget your place how- ever; you got caught trying t0 run gambling racket on the side and subsequent: enacted the yubitsume (finger cutting) ritual of atonement; Rededicating yourself to the gumi earned you the blessings of irezumi tattoos which, in defiance of ancient traditions and in acknowledgement of the more visible status of the yakuza current Combine soci- ety, you had placed on your arms and legs and you spent most of your young adult Iife learning how to work the streets You were in the right place at the right time when Chu-sa Christopher Riteccini, executive officer of the Eleventh Ghost Regiment, happened to be visiting your oyabun. Riteccini spot- ted your natural talent for piloting Mech and invited you t0 join the Ghost Regiment: Soon afterward_ the unit started raiding in the Ghost Bear Occupation Zone One such raid resulted in cat: astrophe that earned you the enmity of your commanding officer; Tai-sa Tomi Ourho Clan Ghost Bear retaliated in force against your unit, dropping several Clusters onto the worid from which the Eleventh operates_ Though you survived the most intense combat you have ever faced the shocking osses around you drove you to substance abuse to overcome fear of your own mortality: Your deteriorating situation leads you to re-examine your life. Though you are still Ioyal to the yakuza; life on the front lines has taken its toll: sideline outside the Ghost Regiment may be just the answer
Affiliation: Draconis Combine 261; Stage 1: Early Childhood (Street) Event Roll (p; 35). Stage 2: Late Childhood Street) Event Roll 11 (p. 391. Stage 4: Real Life (Yakuza} Event Roll (p. 521.
